01 About
Mario Elisei
Design Engineer
AI is generating results...

AI Product Design.
Engineering + Design 🚀

Computer Engineer with a postgraduate degree in Industrial Automation Engineering and a strong background in design and systems thinking. By combining engineering, design, and AI-driven product development, I build highly complex digital systems that balance scalable architecture, service integration, usability, and visual precision. Currently, I work as the principal product designer on the AI team, designing systems that integrate artificial intelligence into enterprise platforms, improving workflows, reducing cognitive load, and optimizing operational and energy efficiency.
